name: getAbsFilePath
title: getAbsFilePath
syntax: long getAbsFilePath(char relPath[], char absPath[], long absPathLen)
description: Gets the absolute path of a file.
As parameter the file should be defined with the relative path to the current configuration.

parameters.name: relPath
parameters.description: A path (with or without a file name) defined relative to the current configuration. If this parameter is empty, then the full path of the current configuration will simply be returned.

return: On success this function returns length of the full path name, otherwise -1.
